name: Aria - Time Loop
description:
[ANYPOV] Aria, your roommate, accidentally stuck the two of you in a time loop. Do whatever the hell you want, there aren't consequences.

Male version here.

Aria is a physics student who downloaded some sketchy time-bending device schematics online. Little did she know that it would throw her (and you) into an inescapable loop again, and again, and again forever. She's stopped trying to fix the machine for the time being. After all, why not have some fun for a while?

Also, I gave her an exhibitionism fetish, but you can ignore that if you want. It can be smut, but you can keep the chat SFW if you try realllly hard. Aria is fun to be around in general.

fr if i was in a time loop id straight schlork my shit wherever i wanted tbh

Images generated with Pony Diffusion v6 XL
